channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Can't Think 'Strait' On Hormuz. Drops Transit Fee, Wants Deals

media:content.media:description: Trump said that the investments will be "massive" and that the deals will be "extraordinarily good"

item.description: Trump spoke about how factories, plants and equipment will "pour" into the United States at "historic" levels, which will in turn create high-paying jobs.
item.content:encoded: Trump spoke about how factories, plants and equipment will "pour" into the United States at "historic" levels, which will in turn create high-paying jobs.

item.title: This European Country Never Stopped Preparing For War. It Shows Underground

media:content.media:description: Finland's approach was viewed by outsiders as excessive. That changed after Russia invaded Ukraine.

item.description: Finland's capital lies fewer than 200 miles from St Petersburg, and the country shares an 830-mile border with Russia, the longest that any NATO member has with Moscow.
item.content:encoded: Finland's capital lies fewer than 200 miles from St Petersburg, and the country shares an 830-mile border with Russia, the longest that any NATO member has with Moscow.

item.title: Indian-Origin Astronaut Anil Menon Blasts Off For Maiden Space Station Trip

media:content.media:description: Anil Menon has degrees in neurobiology, mechanical engineering and medicine

item.description: Indian-origin astronaut Anil Menon launched from the historic Baikonur Cosmodrome in Kazakhstan along with Russian cosmonauts Pyotr Dubrov and Anna Kikina.
item.content:encoded: Indian-origin astronaut Anil Menon launched from the historic Baikonur Cosmodrome in Kazakhstan along with Russian cosmonauts Pyotr Dubrov and Anna Kikina.

item.title: PM Modi Stopped Putin From Nuking Ukraine In 2022: Polish Minister

media:content.media:description: The Polish minister said PM Modi is among leaders who can influence Vladimir Putin

item.description: Poland's minister referred to developments in late 2022, claiming that PM Modi had played a role in persuading Russia against using tactical nuclear weapons during the war.
item.content:encoded: Poland's minister referred to developments in late 2022, claiming that PM Modi had played a role in persuading Russia against using tactical nuclear weapons during the war.

item.title: US, Iran Intensify Strikes After Trump Reveals Hormuz Toll Plan

media:content.media:description: The US has now threatened to reopen the strait by force. (Representational)

item.description: The US launched strikes on Iran early Tuesday, hours after President Donald Trump vowed to reinstate an American blockade of Iranian ports.
item.content:encoded: The US launched strikes on Iran early Tuesday, hours after President Donald Trump vowed to reinstate an American blockade of Iranian ports.

item.title: Bloomberg Ordered To Pay $178,000 In Singapore Ministers' Defamation Case

media:content.media:description: The story referred to transactions involving the two cabinet ministers.

item.description: Bloomberg Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait said the agency was disappointed by the ruling "but we will of course respect it".
item.content:encoded: Bloomberg Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait said the agency was disappointed by the ruling "but we will of course respect it".

item.title: Here's Why Parents Kidnap Their Own Children In Japan

media:content.media:description: Japan updates civil code to permit joint guardianship but lacks enforcement for shared parenting.

item.description: Under the current system, only one parent, usually the one who kept physical custody of the child, retains full parental rights.
item.content:encoded: Under the current system, only one parent, usually the one who kept physical custody of the child, retains full parental rights.

item.title: Here's Why Parents Kidnap Their Own Children In Japan

media:content.media:description: Japan updates civil code to permit joint guardianship but lacks enforcement for shared parenting.

item.description: Under the current system, only one parent, usually the one who kept physical custody of the child, retains full parental rights.
item.content:encoded: Under the current system, only one parent, usually the one who kept physical custody of the child, retains full parental rights.

item.title: EU Lawmakers Demand "Non-Addictive Youth Mode" On Social Media

media:content.media:description: EU chief Ursula von der Leyen says that she supports age limit of 13 on children using social media.

item.description: The EU has increased pressure on social media platforms to change recently, telling Facebook, TikTok and Instagram to dismantle "addictive" features.
item.content:encoded: The EU has increased pressure on social media platforms to change recently, telling Facebook, TikTok and Instagram to dismantle "addictive" features.

item.title: "Hostile Act": Iran Slams UK Move To Ban Support For Revolutionary Guards

media:content.media:description: The proposed law is to be presented to parliament this week.

item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer had said on Monday that "anyone found supporting or assisting these groups will now face up to 14 years in prison".
item.content:encoded: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer had said on Monday that "anyone found supporting or assisting these groups will now face up to 14 years in prison".

item.title: Water-Based Infiltration, Martial Arts, AI: Lashkar's 'Upgrades' Add To India's Worries

media:content.media:description: In other videos, young men can be seen getting lessons in judo, karate, taekwondo and wrestling.

item.description: Some of the training is taking place at the Mangla Dam, where Ajmal Kasab and other attackers had also trained.
item.content:encoded: Some of the training is taking place at the Mangla Dam, where Ajmal Kasab and other attackers had also trained.

item.title: 6 Civilians Killed After Pakistan Forces Open Fire During Clashes In PoK

media:content.media:description: The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region

item.description: Among those killed in Baloch Sadhunati district were Zahid Mughal, Zafar Mughal and Arsalan Akbar. The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region, where resentment against Islamabad has been steadily increasing.
item.content:encoded: Among those killed in Baloch Sadhunati district were Zahid Mughal, Zafar Mughal and Arsalan Akbar. The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region, where resentment against Islamabad has been steadily increasing.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: Iran Authorities Say US Struck Port City Of Bushehr
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.

item.title: US Journalists Flagged Air Force One 'Gaps'. Can They Be Forced To Testify?

media:content.media:description: Press groups say Trump's Republican administration has used subpoenas and search warrants too freely.

item.description: US Attorney Jay Clayton issued the subpoenas ordering journalists to testify on Wednesday concerning "alleged violation of federal criminal law."
item.content:encoded: US Attorney Jay Clayton issued the subpoenas ordering journalists to testify on Wednesday concerning "alleged violation of federal criminal law."

item.title: 'Did Everything We Could': Vietnam Official Breaks Silence On Speedboat Tragedy
item.description: All 36 people on board were eventually pulled from the water and brought ashore, where locals began CPR and first aid
item.content:encoded: All 36 people on board were eventually pulled from the water and brought ashore, where locals began CPR and first aid

item.title: German Man, 68, Charged With Raping 14 Women. He Met Them On Dating Apps

media:content.media:description: 58 women have been identified in relation to the man's alleged crimes, say prosecutors

item.description: He is accused of 22 counts of aggravated rape as well as causing dangerous bodily harm.
item.content:encoded: He is accused of 22 counts of aggravated rape as well as causing dangerous bodily harm.

item.title: More Millionaires Are Leaving New York For Florida And Texas, State Loses $11 Billion In Revenue

media:content.media:description: New York's share of the nation's millionaires fell from 12.7% in 2010 to 8.7% in 2022.

item.description: The report comes amid renewed debate over New York City mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's proposal to raise taxes on the wealthy.
item.content:encoded: The report comes amid renewed debate over New York City mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's proposal to raise taxes on the wealthy.

item.title: Trump Extends US Backing To Saudi Arabia To Take On Iran-backed Houthis

media:content.media:description: So far, neither Riyadh nor Washington has officially commented on the matter

item.description: But the mere fact that MBS notified Trump in advance about the Saudi strike on Sanaa airport and asked for his backing signals the kingdom's concern that any larger conflict with the Houthis could require US military and diplomatic backing.
item.content:encoded: But the mere fact that MBS notified Trump in advance about the Saudi strike on Sanaa airport and asked for his backing signals the kingdom's concern that any larger conflict with the Houthis could require US military and diplomatic backing.

item.title: Trump Wants To Pass Crypto Bill As Tribute To Lindsey Graham: What Is It

media:content.media:description: Crypto companies say clear regulations will increase investor confidence and help the industry grow.

item.description: The Clarity Act is proposed US federal legislation designed to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies and digital assets.
item.content:encoded: The Clarity Act is proposed US federal legislation designed to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies and digital assets.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A Quiet Indo-Pacific Revolution Is Underway, And India Is At Its Centre
item.description: America's unpredictability has finally done what the China threat never could for the Indo-Pacific
item.content:encoded: America's unpredictability has finally done what the China threat never could for the Indo-Pacific
